sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113842" key="xersokopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χερσοκοπ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breaking up of unirrigated land,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
